# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator username."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator password."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL database."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "S2"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU name."
      }
    },
    "skuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU tier."
      }
    },
    "skuCapacity": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 5,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU capacity (DTUs). Basic=5, S0=10, S1=20, S2=50."
      }
    },
    "collation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2147483648",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Max size in bytes. Basic default is 2GB."
      }
    },
    "allowAzureServices": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Allow Azure services to access the server."
      }
    },
    "clientIpStart": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "0.0.0.0",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Start IP for firewall rule."
      }
    },
    "clientIpEnd": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "0.0.0.0",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "End IP for firewall rule."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "serverResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "condition": "[parameters('allowAzureServices')]",
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/ClientIp')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "condition": "[not(equals(parameters('clientIpStart'), '0.0.0.0'))]",
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[parameters('clientIpStart')]",
        "endIpAddress": "[parameters('clientIpEnd')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('skuTier')]",
        "capacity": "[parameters('skuCapacity')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "[parameters('collation')]",
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    },
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('serverResourceId'), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('databaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
